title: From prompting to practice: Empowering faculty with AI and prompting tools.
summary: As artificial intelligence (AI) transforms nursing education, faculty must develop digital literacy and prompt engineering skills to integrate these tools effectively. This paper explores how core nursing competencies align with prompt engineering practices. Practical frameworks and examples support...

title: Usability and feasibility of a Socratic Llm-supported learning tool for clinical reasoning in undergraduate nursing education.
summary: To evaluate clinical reasoning outcomes and the usability and feasibility of an AI-supported platform that uses a large language model (LLM) to foster higher-order thinking via the Socratic method....
